sections.heading: Market Overview
sections.content: GCC markets opened mixed today with Saudi Tadawul down 0.3% and Dubai Financial Market up 0.5%. Oil prices stabilized around $85/barrel.

items.title: UAE Non-Oil Economy Expands 4.5% in Q1
items.summary: Driven by tourism and financial services, the UAE's non-oil GDP growth exceeded expectations.

items.title: Saudi Arabia Launches New Investment Initiative
items.summary: The Kingdom announced a $50 billion fund targeting renewable energy and tech startups.

items.title: Qatar Energy Signs LNG Deal with Germany
items.summary: A 15-year agreement to supply 2 million tonnes of LNG annually starting 2026.

sections.heading: Currency & Commodities
sections.content: USD/SAR at 3.75, USD/AED at 3.67. Gold up 0.2% to $2,340/oz. Brent crude at $85.20.

sections.heading: What to Watch Today
sections.content: Central bank meetings in UAE and Saudi Arabia. Earnings reports from ADNOC and Qatar National Bank.
